final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial travel photography scene of a tropical resort pool.

Style/medium: needs a high-saturation tropical resort aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include an infinity pool, lounge chairs with umbrellas, coconut trees
Scene/backdrop: must include ocean view beyond the infinity pool, blue sky with white clouds
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, inviting vacation atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be high-saturation direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
